headline: TE Connectivity survey: Return on investment becomes top priority as AI age evolves
summary: Adoption rates of artificial intelligence tools at industrial technology companies have exceeded 80%, according to a new global survey from TE Connectivity, a world leader in connectors and sensors. And now, the survey data says, these companies are demanding a return on their investments as AI tools become more integrated into their operations.
